title: Finger-Tap Marble Drop — Satisfaction Shell, Sort Core
hook_3s: A manicured finger taps a lavender tray — colorful marbles cascade onto the conveyor with a soft, satisfying clink.
scene_flow: 0–3s HOOK: Close-up POV of a phone in hand, lavender background, finger taps a tray — red and yellow marbles tumble out with juicy physics onto the moving conveyor.
3–7s TENSION: Camera pulls back slightly; marbles roll toward color-coded boxes. One yellow marble is heading for the red box — overlay flashes 'Wait!'
7–11s PAYOFF: Finger taps a second tray at the perfect moment, releasing a blue marble that nudges the yellow into the correct slot. Boxes fill with matching colors — sparkle VFX, satisfying chime.
11–14s ESCALATION: Quick montage of harder levels — more trays, faster conveyor, special striped marbles dropping into glowing orange boxes.
14–15s CTA: Game logo snaps in over lavender backdrop with orange accent button — 'Play Free.'
visual_direction: Lean fully into the Marble Sort! DNA: lavender (#E5DFFF) backdrop, light-grey (#F0F0F8) machine and conveyor, vibrant orange (#FFB13B) for titles, highlights, and the CTA. Clean 3D cartoon style with soft rounded shapes, glossy plastic-like marbles, gentle rim lighting, shallow depth-of-field on the hero finger-tap shot. Borrow only the "finger-on-phone, intimate POV" framing from the jigsaw archetype — replace all puzzle-piece imagery with marbles, trays, and conveyor. Animation feels calm and ASMR-satisfying: bouncy physics, soft chimes, no harsh motion.
rationale: We keep the proven "finger-on-phone satisfaction" framing that wins with casual women 25-55, but swap puzzle pieces for actual Marble Sort gameplay so install intent qualifies correctly. Re-skinning to the lavender/orange palette protects brand recognition in the store and avoids the jigsaw visual clash flagged in fit scoring. UA team should A/B test the hero hook (finger-tap marble cascade) against a 'wrong color near-miss' opener to find the higher IPM.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, aspect 9:16: extreme close-up POV of a woman's manicured finger tapping a small light-grey tray on a smartphone screen, glossy red yellow and blue marbles cascading out with bouncy physics onto a moving light-grey conveyor belt, soft lavender #E5DFFF background, light-grey #F0F0F8 machine, vibrant orange #FFB13B title text reading 'So satisfying…' in the upper third, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, soft rim lighting, shallow depth of field, ASMR mood.

Storyboard frame 2, aspect 9:16: mid-shot of a cartoon sorting machine with three color-coded boxes (red, yellow, blue) below a light-grey #F0F0F8 conveyor belt, glossy marbles rolling toward boxes, one yellow marble veering toward the red box with a motion blur trail, lavender #E5DFFF background, bold orange #FFB13B overlay text 'Wait — wrong color!' centered, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes.

Storyboard frame 3, aspect 9:16: triumphant end card showing color-coded boxes filled with matching glossy marbles, gold sparkle VFX, lavender #E5DFFF backdrop with light-grey #F0F0F8 machine, large vibrant orange #FFB13B button text 'Play Free' at the bottom, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, soft glow.
